    foundry.veil.api.client.render.shader.program.ShaderProgram.toShaderInstance()
    Use VeilRenderBridge.toShaderInstance(ShaderProgram)
    foundry.veil.api.client.render.shader.program.UniformAccess.getOrCreateUniform(CharSequence)
    Use UniformAccess.getUniformSafe(CharSequence) instead
